blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 502 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 55°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
